entry.title: [WSL2] Reclaim Unused Disk Space
entry.summary: For each instance of WSL2, a hard disk image file (.vhdx) is created which acts as the main storage device for that instance. The file grows in size as new files are created in WSL2. However, the storage is never reclaimed(returned to Windows host) when the space is no longer in use by the WSL2 instance. For example, when you delete a file in WSL2, the file does not show up in the filesystem, ...

entry.title: [WSL2] Installing Multiple Instances
entry.summary: WSL2 allows the user to install and manage multiple instances of Linux subsystems. This makes running programs that are dependent on a specific Ubuntu version much more manageable. Install an instance from Microsoft Store Open PowerShell and check currently installed instances: > wsl -l -v NAME STATE VERSION * Ubuntu Running 2 Ubunt...

entry.title: Ubuntu Installation Guide
entry.summary: Prerequisites A host machine with VirtualBox installed: VirtualBox An Ubuntu image file: ubuntu-21.10 Create an empty virtual machine Open Orcale VM VirtualBox From the top menu, click: Machine->new Set up the new virtual machine: Specify a name for the machine Choose Linux for type and Ubuntu (64-bit) for version Set an adequat...

entry.title: Template Page
entry.summary: Use the examples generated below #include <stdio.h> int main() { printf("Hello world\n"); return 0; } $ sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade print("Hello world") Hello world

entry.title: ORB-SLAM 2 Test Run
entry.summary: Prerequisites OpenCV Eigen3 Pangolin Xming(required only in WSL2) OpenCV ref: https://linuxize.com/post/how-to-install-opencv-on-ubuntu-18-04/ Install dependencies: $ sudo apt install build-essential cmake git pkg-config libgtk-3-dev \ libavcodec-dev libavformat-dev libswscale-dev libv4l-dev \ libxvidcore-dev libx264-dev libjpeg-dev libpng-dev libtiff-dev \ gfortran openexr...
